privileged_info_summary: The electrical_panel_schedule task uses a real architectural drawing downloaded from the Apache-licensed jscad/sample-files GitHub repository (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jscad/sample-files/master/dxf/dxf-parser/floorplan.dxf). The input file (floorplan.dxf) is a genuine 2-car garage floor plan (~1.1 MB) containing 967 entities organized across 24 named layers including architectural elements (walls, openings, fixtures, roof), structural components (stem walls, foundations, joists, trusses), and annotations (dimensions, notes, text). The task requires agents to add electrical panel schedule overlays with minimum specifications: 4+ circuit descriptions, 3+ load values, and panel/circuit layers. Data is not synthetic.
